content.text:
I explored the worktree rooted at `/Users/my/.claude/worktrees/agent-a918a5f0` and the archived project under `/Users/my/.claude/worktrees/agent-a918a5f0/.Trash/my-project 19.06.43`.  
No files or directories containing “cron”, “scheduler”, or “schedule” occurred in either tree—glob and regex searches across both directories returned no matches (e.g., the `.Trash` subtree under the archived project contains only workflow templates, docs, and supporting files, none of which mention scheduling helpers).  
Thus there are no visible scheduling/automation helpers or references to credentials/email/calendar access in the current repository.
